jobs.desc: Development and maintenance of full stack and mobile applications. Implementing new features and continuous improvement following agile methodologies and clean, modular architectures.

Continued development of Iberext mobile app, expanding fire prevention systems management features
Full development of EPDM mobile app – Music Portal (published on Google Play Store)
